# ProcessReporter v1.7.0

## Highlights

- Reframes ProcessReporter as a personal Presence utility that sanitizes foreground application, optional window-title, and current-media data before delivering it independently to MixSpace, Slack, and Discord.
- Adds a menu bar Presence popover for sharing state, the current sanitized Presence, destination health, operational notices, and recent activity.
- Replaces the legacy preferences interface with guided onboarding and native General, Destinations, Privacy & Rules, Sync History, and Advanced settings.

## Fixes and reliability

- Applies global and per-application Share, Hide, and Alias rules before delivery, and records sanitized Sync Events with independent destination results and safe error summaries.
- Treats S3-compatible storage as optional application-icon hosting, so an icon upload failure can degrade enrichment without blocking text Presence delivery.
- Adds draft-based destination editing with testing and unsaved-change protection, credential-free settings exports, and validated imports with an explicit legacy-credential restoration decision.

## Update notes

- S3-compatible storage now appears as Application Icon Hosting rather than a Presence destination; MixSpace, Slack, and Discord remain the delivery destinations.
- Window-title sharing is disabled by default for new installations and requires Accessibility permission only when enabled.
